  "findings": [
    "Missing drip pan under water heater where required by code (IPC 504.7 / IRC P2804.6.1)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down and drain water heater if leak poses immediate property damage risk.",
    "Install listed corrosion-resistant drip pan with minimum 1-1/2 in. deep, sized per manufacturer, piped to drain or outdoors per code.",
    "Reinstall water heater in pan and connect T&P relief valve drain per code."
  ],
  "rationale": "IPC 504.7 and IRC P2804.6.1 require a drip pan where a water heater is installed in a location where leakage would cause damage. The field observation is 'no drip pan where required', which is a code non-compliance that can lead to water damage. The condition is observed in-service, so the work is complete but defective. Decision is fail until a proper pan and drain are installed.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.7",
    "IRC P2804.6.1"
  ]
}
